zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Stanhope於大約1379年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾易亞斯特 馬卡姆時，他的父親John Stanhope62歲，母親Elizabeth Malovell62歲。他於1408年與Isabella Markham在英國諾廷加姆爾藍普頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1432年3月2日在英國英格蘭越可爾衛克菲德享年54歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾圖福德。

nameMeanings.name: Stanhope
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Stanhope (Durham), from Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + hop ‘valley’.

History: A family of this name have held the title Earl of Harrington since 1742, and were Earls of Chesterfield from 1628–1967. Philip Stanhope, 1st Earl of Chesterfield, was a Royalist soldier in the English Civil War. He was captured in 1643 and died in prison in 1656.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Stanhope was born about 1379, in East Markham, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Stanhope, was 62 and his mother, Elizabeth Malovell, was 62. He married Isabella Markham in 1408, in Rampton, Nottinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 2 March 1432, in Wakefield, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 54, and was buried in Tuxford, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard Stanhope est né environ 1379, à East Markham, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Stanhope, avait 62 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Malovell, avait 62 ans. Il a épousé Isabella Markham en 1408, à Rampton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 2 mars 1432, à Wakefield, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Tuxford, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er hat 1408 in Rampton, Nottinghamshire, England Isabella Markham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 2. März 1432 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Wakefield, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Tuxford, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Stanhopeが約1379年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアエアスト マークハムで生まれた時，父John Stanhopeは62歳，母Elizabeth Malovellは62歳であった。1408年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアランプトンでIsabella Markhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1432年3月2日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアワケフィールドで54歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアトゥクスフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Stanhope(이)가 대략 1379년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 이스트 마카에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Stanhope(은)는 62세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Malovell(은)는 62세였다. 그는 1408년 영국 노틴그함실르 램프턴에서 Isabella Markham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1432년 3월 2일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 웨이크필드에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 투스퍼드에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Isabella Markham em 1408, em Rampton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard Stanhope родился около 1379 г. в местности эаст мархам, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Stanhope было 62 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Malovell, 62. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabella Markham в 1408 г. в местности рамптон, ноттингхамшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 2 марта 1432 г. в местности веикефиелд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности туксфорд, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Isabella Markham en 1408, en Rampton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 2 de marzo de 1432, en Wakefield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultado en Tuxford, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
